text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Regular consumption of nuts has been associated with a reduced risk of cardiovascular disease in several large prospective cohort studies.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Regular consumption of nuts has been associated with a reduced risk of cardiovascular disease in several large prospective cohort studies.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states an association between regular nut consumption and lower cardiovascular disease risk in large cohort studies.","population":"participants in several large prospective cohort studies","intervention":"regular consumption of nuts","comparator":"","outcome":"reduced risk of cardiovascular disease","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"In the Nurses Health Study, women who ate nuts five or more times per week had a 35% lower risk of coronary heart disease than women who rarely ate nuts.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"In the Nurses Health Study, women who ate nuts five or more times per week had a 35% lower risk of coronary heart disease than women who rarely ate nuts.","entailment":"The quoted sentence provides the observed risk reduction for women eating nuts frequently compared with those who rarely ate nuts.","population":"women in the Nurses Health Study","intervention":"ate nuts five or more times per week","comparator":"women who rarely ate nuts","outcome":"35% lower risk of coronary heart disease","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"35% lower risk","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Observational findings may be confounded because nut consumers tended to exercise more and smoke less.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"However, observational findings may be confounded: nut consumers tended to exercise more and smoke less.","entailment":"The quoted sentence suggests that the observed associations could be biased due to differences in exercise and smoking between nut consumers and non‑consumers.","population":"nut consumers","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"tended to exercise more and smoke less","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"}]}
